
  // Type_new
  public class Type_new {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
  }
  // Generic_new_any
  public class Generic_new_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_new = e_new
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_new_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_new
    }
  }
  // Generic_new_type
  public class Generic_new_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_new = v_new_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_new = v_new_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_new = v_new_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_new = f_new(type_type, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_new_constructor
  public static func v_new_constructor(
  ) -> Type_new {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_new()
  }
  // v_new_create
  public static func v_new_create(
  ) -> Type_new {
    var output : Type_new = v_new_constructor()
    v_new_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_new_register
  public static func v_new_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_new_startup_type()
    v_new_startup_empty()
    return t_new
  }
  // v_new_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_new_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_new
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_new_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = e_new
    }
  }
  // v_new_startup - mutating
  public static func v_new_startup(
    _ value : Type_new
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_new_any = Generic_new_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_new,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_new_startup_empty
  public static func v_new_startup_empty() {
    v_new_startup(e_new)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_new,
      e_new.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_new_startup_type
  public static func v_new_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_new
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/new")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_func
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_new_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_new
  public static func v_any_from_new(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_new
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_new_from_any
  public static func v_new_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_new {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_new = Vx_Core.e_new
    if let generic_any : Generic_new_any = type_any.generic_any {
      output = generic_any.backref
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_new_copy
  public static func v_new_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_new,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_new {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_new = copyval
    Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    let orig_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist = copyval.type_func.anylist
    let merged_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist = Vx_Core.v_anylist_copy(
      orig_anylist,
      anylist
    )
    let msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      merged_anylist.type_any
    )
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    let orig_msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    if msgblock !== orig_msgblock {
      ischanged = true
    }
    if !ischanged {
      ischanged = Vx_Core.v_booleann_issame_from_anylist_anylist(
        orig_anylist,
        merged_anylist
      )
    }
    if ischanged {
      let type_delta : Vx_Core.Type_delta = Vx_Core.v_delta_from_any(
        merged_anylist.type_any
      )
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(anylist.type_any)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_msgblock(msgblock)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_delta(type_delta)
      output = Type_new = v_new_create()
      output.type_func.anylist = anylist
      output.type_any.type_msgblock = msgblock
      output.type_any.type_delta = delta
    }
    Vx_Core.v_release_except_listany(
      output.type_any,
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any,
        merged_anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    return output
  }
  // f_new
  public static func f_new(
    _ type_type : Type_type,
    _ type_anylist : Type_anylist
  ) -> Type_any {
    var generic_type : Generic_type = v_generic_type_from_type(type_type)
    var output : Type_any = generic_type.p_new(type_type, type_anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_new : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.Type_type()
  public static let e_new : Type_new = Type_new()
